{{CargoRelic
|name=Bowl of Troika
|class_id=20337
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=On that day, the three dogs swore brotherhood to Guan Yu under the peach tree. The pact was sealed with a deep kotow. From then on, they rode in the same vehicles, lived in the same lodging, and even ate out of the same bowl. What an unbreakable bond!
|fame=12
|art=16
|fth=30
|civ=14
|tech=18
|ss1=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +10<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss2=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +20<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss3=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +30<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss4=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +30<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss7=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +30<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200<br> (Awakened)
}}
